calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Allowing Modification Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Sancimino for and with Joanne Imperial.

Ms. Sancimino stated that they could dissolve the Bypass Trust, move all of the assets to the Survivor's Trust and restrict Ms. Imperial's access. Ms. Sancimino also stated that the Beneficiaries are in agreement. The Petition for Order Allowing Modification of Irrevocable Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order Allowing Modification Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Allowing Modification Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Continued To May-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Allowing Modification Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Continued To Apr-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ritzi Lam for Joanne Imperial.

The Court stated that it does not think it can proceed under Probate Code 15404 even with consents of the Beneficiaries and the surviving Trustor, questions whether the Trust can be modified for changed circumstances and what the changed circumstances are, and stated that change in tax law is not a sufficient basis. Ms. Lam stated that if both Trustors were alive it's an option they would have chosen, that they received outdated advise by the Lawyers, and that all of the Children and that the Grandchildren are a product of this marriage and are comfortable with it. Ms. Lam also stated that Joanne is in her eighties and needs more flexibility, that a lot of assets in the Survivor's Trust are in brokerage accounts, that the house is in the Bypass Trust, that Joanne does not intend to sell the house, that Joanne would like the option of a reverse mortgage if needed and raised the issue of having to do two income taxes. The Court stated that it does not see a basis for what is being requested and that it does not see cognizable circumstances. The Petition for Order Allowing Modification of Irrevocable Trust is continued to April 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Lam to amend or supplement the petition, or decide that it is not worth doing now. Ms. Lam is to advise the Court no later than April 6, 2017 if she chooses not to proceed with the petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
